name: Mining
description: Dig down carefully with torches, tools, and food. Avoid digging straight down. Use strip mining at diamond levels.

name: Strip Mining
description: Mine long tunnels at Y=-59 to find diamonds. Place torches every 10 blocks and watch for lava.

name: Caving
description: Explore natural caves for exposed ores. Bring plenty of torches, food, and armor.

name: Nether Exploration
description: Wear gold armor around piglins. Bring fire resistance potions. Build safe paths over lava.

name: Ender Dragon Fight
description: Destroy end crystals with arrows or blocks. Attack the dragon when it perches. Bring slow falling potions.

name: Wither Fight
description: Fight underground or in a confined space to limit movement. Use smite enchanted sword and healing potions.

name: Warden Avoidance
description: Move slowly in the deep dark. Wool blocks reduce vibrations. Use snowballs to distract.

name: Villager Trading
description: Protect villagers with walls and beds. Provide job blocks for trades. Cures zombie villagers for discounts.

name: Farming
description: Plant crops on hydrated farmland. Use bonemeal to speed growth. Keep light level high.

name: Animal Farming
description: Breed animals with their preferred food. Keep them in enclosed pens with water.

name: Base Defense
description: Light the area, build walls, use iron golems, and place traps for hostile mobs.

name: Raid Defense
description: Ring a bell to reveal raiders. Use walls and ranged attacks. Heal between waves.

name: Exploration
description: Bring food, torches, a bed, and a compass. Mark your path to avoid getting lost.

name: Combat Basics
description: Equip the right weapon and armor. Strafe to avoid attacks. Retreat when low on health.

name: Enchanting
description: Build bookshelves around the enchanting table. Use an anvil to combine enchanted books.

name: Brewing
description: Build a brewing stand with blaze rods. Nether wart is the base for most potions.

name: Smelting
description: Use furnaces, blast furnaces for ores, and smokers for food. Choose fuel based on availability.

name: Redstone Basics
description: Power components with redstone dust, torches, and repeaters. Use observers for block detection.

name: Building
description: Plan foundations and storage first. Use scaffolding for tall builds. Light interiors.

name: Automation
description: Use hoppers, droppers, dispensers, and observers to create farms, sorters, and mob grinders.

name: Speedrun
description: Focus on wood, tools, iron, flint and steel, beds, and eyes of ender. Minimize detours.

name: Resource Management
description: Store items in labeled chests. Keep backups of important tools. Use shulker boxes for travel.

name: Preparation
description: Before a big task, gather food, tools, armor, blocks, potions, and set a spawn point.

name: Recovery
description: After death, prioritize retrieving items before re-engaging threats. Use a backup set of gear.

name: Multiplayer
description: Coordinate roles, share resources, and establish safe zones. Communicate before risky actions.
